description_long: This is a sleek, red coupe car with a streamlined body and a modern, angular design. The front features a prominent grille with a recognizable badge, flanked by rectangular headlights and a sculpted hood. The side profile reveals four doors, flush door handles, and silver alloy wheels, with a gently sloping roofline that tapers toward the rear. The rear view shows a compact trunk, integrated taillights, and dual exhaust tips, emphasizing its sporty character. The windows are tinted, and the interior appears to have two rows of seats with a light-colored upholstery. The overall appearance suggests a mid-2000s luxury coupe, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A red, modern coupe car with four doors, silver wheels, and a streamlined, sporty design. Features a prominent grille, tinted windows, and a gently sloping roofline.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, badge, rectangular headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, silver wheels, and the smooth, sloping roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact trunk, taillights, and dual exhaust tips.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door arrangement and alloy wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with three side windows per side
